skills.name: project-synthesis-product-constitution
skills.summary: Defines the product-level constitution, invariants, boundaries, and non-negotiable safety rules for ELMOS Project Synthesis.

skills.name: unified-synthesis-engine-contract
skills.summary: Defines the canonical engine API used by UI, CLI, agents, runners, and external integrations.

skills.name: project-synthesis-ir-schema
skills.summary: Defines PSIR, the canonical intermediate representation for requirements, domain behavior, architecture intent, and delivery constraints.

skills.name: artifact-graph-schema
skills.summary: Defines the graph linking requirements, PSIR nodes, architecture decisions, generated files, tests, evidence, and deliveries.

skills.name: synthesis-job-state-machine
skills.summary: Defines the lifecycle, transitions, guards, compensations, and terminal states of a synthesis run.

skills.name: synthesis-scope-and-engine-extension
skills.summary: Extends ELMOS scope resolution so new-project synthesis and legacy modernization share platform objects without mixing semantics.

skills.name: evidence-and-audit-contract
skills.summary: Defines evidence objects, audit records, signatures, retention, and claim-to-proof rules.

skills.name: policy-and-capability-model
skills.summary: Defines policy evaluation and capability grants for agents, skills, tools, runners, repositories, networks, and secrets.

skills.name: deterministic-run-context
skills.summary: Captures all versions, inputs, models, policies, templates, dependencies, and environment facts needed to reproduce a run.

skills.name: migration-synthesis-interoperability
skills.summary: Defines controlled handoffs between newly generated projects and existing ELMOS modernization or cross-language migration engines.

skills.name: natural-language-session-orchestrator
skills.summary: Runs the multi-turn discovery session that converts natural language into an approved requirement workspace.

skills.name: requirement-intent-classifier
skills.summary: Classifies user utterances and documents into requirement-relevant intent categories.

skills.name: document-and-repo-input-adapter
skills.summary: Normalizes requirements from documents, archives, API definitions, issue trackers, and example repositories.

skills.name: product-glossary-builder
skills.summary: Builds and maintains the domain glossary, aliases, acronyms, and disambiguation rules for a synthesis workspace.

skills.name: stakeholder-and-actor-extractor
skills.summary: Extracts stakeholders, system actors, external systems, responsibilities, and access expectations.

skills.name: functional-requirement-extractor
skills.summary: Extracts atomic, testable functional requirements from natural language and source materials.

skills.name: nonfunctional-requirement-extractor
skills.summary: Extracts quality attributes, operational constraints, compliance needs, and measurable service expectations.

skills.name: constraint-assumption-extractor
skills.summary: Extracts technical, organizational, legal, schedule, budget, and environment constraints while maintaining an explicit assumption ledger.

skills.name: ambiguity-question-generator
skills.summary: Generates minimal, high-value clarification questions ranked by expected impact.

skills.name: conversation-memory-to-spec
skills.summary: Consolidates approved multi-turn conversation facts into the requirement specification while preserving supersession history.

skills.name: requirement-normalizer
skills.summary: Normalizes requirement wording, structure, identifiers, modality, and verification fields.

skills.name: requirement-deduplicator
skills.summary: Detects exact, semantic, and partially overlapping duplicate requirements.

skills.name: requirement-conflict-detector
skills.summary: Detects logical, temporal, permission, data, technology, and quality-target conflicts.

skills.name: scope-boundary-manager
skills.summary: Defines in-scope, out-of-scope, deferred, dependency, and future-option boundaries.

skills.name: requirement-priority-classifier
skills.summary: Classifies requirement priority using value, urgency, dependency, risk, and delivery slicing.

skills.name: requirement-risk-classifier
skills.summary: Scores requirements for ambiguity, complexity, security, compliance, integration, data, and delivery risk.

skills.name: measurable-quality-attribute-builder
skills.summary: Converts quality expectations into measurable scenarios with thresholds, workload, environment, and observation methods.

skills.name: acceptance-criteria-generator
skills.summary: Generates requirement-level acceptance criteria and negative scenarios from approved intent.

skills.name: definition-of-ready-validator
skills.summary: Determines whether the requirement baseline is sufficiently complete and safe for architecture planning.

skills.name: requirement-quality-score
skills.summary: Computes explainable quality scores for completeness, clarity, consistency, testability, traceability, and feasibility.

skills.name: requirements-baseline-and-approval
skills.summary: Creates immutable requirement baselines and manages stakeholder approvals, rejections, and exceptions.

skills.name: requirements-change-impact
skills.summary: Analyzes changes between requirement baselines and determines affected domain, architecture, code, test, data, and delivery artifacts.
